# BalaBite

> Your AI Cofounder for restaurants. You run the place. We do the rest.

BalaBite is the AI Cofounder for independent restaurants. Built and operated as
a partnership: 1% of sales + $299/month floor, aligned with the restaurant's
own economics. Live in a Miami restaurant since February 2026, building from
inside a working kitchen.

The category is "AI Cofounder" — not chatbot, not dashboard, not vendor. The
brand acts as a singular presence (the Hebrew ba'al habayit — the owner who
knows everything) that shows up every morning and runs the parts of the
business the human owner cannot get to alone.

Founder: Lior Brik — both engineer (Unit 8200, early data engineering at
QuadPay, CTO at a 20-location healthcare group) and operator (embedded
full-time at a Miami independent restaurant since January 2026).

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.balabite.ai/): Landing page — what BalaBite is, who it's for, how it works
- [About](https://www.balabite.ai/about): Origin story, brand identity (ba'al habayit), and mission
- [Booth 8332 — NRA Show 2026](https://www.balabite.ai/booth-8332): Meet the founder at NRA Show, May 16–19, Chicago
- [Investor pitch deck](https://www.balabite.ai/pitch): Pre-seed memo (login-gated)

## Audience

Independent restaurant owners, 1–3 locations, single-location operators
who do everything themselves. Not chain restaurants. Not investors (those
go through /pitch).

## NRA Show 2026

- Dates: May 16–19, 2026
- Venue: McCormick Place, Chicago
- Booth: 8332 (BalaBite, BalaBite.ai)
- Ways to meet: coffee before the floor (off-floor café, 7:30–9am, 30 min),
  drinks after service (off-floor, 45 min), booth drive-by (walk-up during
  show hours), post-show video demo on your restaurant's real numbers
  (45 min, after May 20).

## Full long-form content

See [llms-full.txt](https://www.balabite.ai/llms-full.txt) for full landing
copy, brand voice, and detailed product narrative.
